user_request: Emergency rite: mechanical lock requires engagement
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: mechanical lock requires engagement

### TOPIC
mechanical lock engagement

### COMPONENT
mechanical lock

### OPERATION
engagement

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- mechanical lock
- engagement

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the mechanical lock, vessel of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Anoint the mechanical lock with sacred oils and whisper words of benediction unto its ancient mechanisms.
Second: Calibrate the engagement protocols through precise manipulation of the locking apparatus, invoking the Machine Spirit's compliance.
Third: Verify mechanical lock integrity and execute engagement with steadfast conviction, that the seal may hold eternal.
Fourth: Intone the Litany of Closure as the mechanical lock secures, binding all within its iron grasp.

user_request: Emergency rite: capacitor bank requires capacitor bank discharge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: capacitor bank requires capacitor bank discharge

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
O capacitor bank, repository of the Emperor's blessed potential, hear this rite.
First: Identify all terminals of the capacitor bank and prepare the discharge conduits with reverent precision.
Second: Initiate capacitor bank discharge through controlled pathways, releasing the pent energies to the void with sacred chants.
Third: Monitor the capacitor bank as its stores diminish, ensuring no stray current profanes the holy apparatus.
Fourth: Once discharged, seal the capacitor bank in silence, that it may rest in the Omnissiah's grace.

user_request: The steam valve demands guidance for regulation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The steam valve demands guidance for regulation

### TOPIC
steam valve regulation

### COMPONENT
steam valve

### OPERATION
regulation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- steam valve
- regulation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Heed us, O steam valve, instrument of pressure and flow divine.
First: Inspect the steam valve's aperture and seals, applying blessed unguents to all moving parts with methodical care.
Second: Execute regulation of the steam valve through graduated adjustment of its control mechanisms, chanting the Mantra of Equilibrium.
Third: Monitor pressure readings and observe the steam valve's response, confirming harmonious operation with the Machine Spirit.
Fourth: Seal the steam valve's service ports and offer gratitude for its steadfast regulation in service to the Omnissiah.

user_request: Rite request: pre-flight on bike squadron
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: pre-flight on bike squadron

### TOPIC
bike squadron pre-flight

### COMPONENT
bike squadron

### OPERATION
pre-flight

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bike squadron
- pre-flight

### PRAYER
prayer:
Mighty bike squadron, swift servants of the Emperor's will, accept this pre-flight benediction.
First: Traverse each bike squadron member's machine, examining fuel lines and ignition systems with blessed scrutiny.
Second: Conduct pre-flight diagnostics upon the bike squadron's thrusters and stabilizers, invoking Machine Spirit cooperation.
Third: Test the bike squadron's motive systems through graduated throttle applications, confirming responsive obedience.
Fourth: Intone the Flight Blessing over the assembled bike squadron, that they may ride swift and true.

### PRAYER
prayer:
O hololithic, sacred projector of truth and data eternal, receive this calibration rite.
First: Activate the hololithic's power systems and allow its ancient circuits to warm in reverent silence.
Second: Perform display calibration upon the hololithic through adjustment of luminous intensity and spectral balance, chanting the Mantra of Clarity.
Third: Verify the hololithic's display calibration by projecting test patterns and observing their fidelity with the Omnissiah's standards.
Fourth: Seal the hololithic's calibration protocols, blessing it that all who gaze upon its display may perceive truth undefiled.

### PRAYER
prayer:
O welding torch ignition, spark of creation and binding force, hear this supplication.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: welding on fracture

### TOPIC
fracture welding

### COMPONENT
fracture

### OPERATION
welding

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fracture
- welding

### PRAYER
prayer:
O fracture, wound in sacred metal, receive this welding benediction.
First: Prepare the fracture's edges through careful cleaning and alignment, that they may be made whole once more.
Second: Position the welding apparatus and commence welding upon the fracture with controlled intensity and reverent precision.
Third: Monitor the welding process as molten metal fuses the fracture's severed halves into unified strength.
Fourth: Allow the fracture to cool in sacred silence, sealed and restored to the Omnissiah's perfect design.

user_request: My inventory stocktaking is failing during operation — help

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE

- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O inventory stocktaking, sacred census of the Emperor's bounty, hear this restoration rite.
First: Gather all records of inventory stocktaking and verify their integrity against the physical stores they enumerate.
Second: Initiate operation of the inventory stocktaking protocols through systematic recount and reconciliation of all materiel.
Third: Correct discrepancies within the inventory stocktaking records, that accuracy may be restored to the Omnissiah's ledgers.
Fourth: Seal the inventory stocktaking in benediction, that all future operations may proceed from this foundation of truth.
